title: Spicy Larb Bean Stir Fry
description: A spicy and savory stir fry made with Thai-inspired flavors and piquant bean sprouts.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the cooked bean and stir to combine with the garlic.
Add the bean sprouts, piquant sauce, Thai larb spice, smoked paprika, and soy sauce. Stir to combine.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, until the sprouts are slightly tender.
Season with salt and chili flakes (if using).
Serve hot and garnish with additional Thai larb spice (if desired).
